title: anthoxanthum puelii var. nanum
intro: Anthoxanthum puelii var. nanum, also known as the dwarf velvet grass or dwarf tufted grass, is a small perennial plant belonging to the grass family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating coughs and colds, and treating skin irritations. The herbal preparations of Anthoxanthum puelii var. nanum often involve making teas or infusions from its leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
